programme.title: Double Dragon
programme.desc: Two brothers have half of a powerful ancient Chinese talisman An evil gang leader has the other half and determines to get the brothers half and have a complete medallion so he can gain absolute power

programme.title: SpaceCamp
programme.desc: The young attendees of a space camp find themselves in space for real when their shuttle is accidentally launched into orbit

programme.title: Adventures of the Wilderness Family
programme.desc: The Robinson family decide to leave city life behind for one of clean living in the wilderness for the sake of their daughters health There they learn the value of family as they become closer to nature

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Julie is attracted to an older man and pursued by a teen with a crush; Bo and Sam break a ships model meant for Merrills anniversary gift and work to fix it in time; Diana and Jeff try to find common ground between their parents

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Bobbie Jo has a chance to move to New York for singing lessons

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe plots to buy a new stove to replace the old wood-burning stove that Kate currently uses The old stove requires Joe to constantly cut wood for the burning

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Fredy 114
programme.desc: Fredy 114

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A life on the edge hot rodder named Billy comes to town run by Sheriff Garrett he immediately dates and romances his daughter with ulterior motives linked to Garretts past for which he was once a champion of the hot rodding Will Garrett accept Billys challenge to the death

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A mousy librarian over-react reports of a serial killer

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Vicious and ruthless killer Ron and his antsy wimp partner Jimmy Lee Stoler are a couple of escaped convicts on the lam from the law The dangerous duo break into a model home in search of a safe only to discover a family residing in said swanky abode

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Puritanical small town mayor Jake Purly is running for reelection on a strict platform that vehemently opposes sex and pornography However a dark secret from Purlys shady past threatens to resurface and destroy his credibility in the form of lovely escort Dr Rita de Roy

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Jannette asks Nick for help in investigating the murder of a friend which leads Nick into the bizarre world of prostitution

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan travel to a seaside village to retrieve a cursed foghorn that is being used by a town resident to summon the ghost of a vengeful pirate

programme.title: Cheerleader Camp
programme.desc: A cheerleader Betsy Russell her boyfriend Leif Garrett colleagues and a team mascot Lucinda Dickey attend a competition spoiled by murder

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys scheme to get rid of a troublesome new member of the 73 Crew and in the process wind up in big trouble But the new Crewman - Who happens to be the spitting-image of Binghamton - Turns out to be quite useful in a complicated plan to get them off the hook

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer accompanies his friend Frankie to his home for the weekend While there Gomer sings a love song to Frankies sister who is engaged to a local fellow who is not in a rush to get married Frankie and his mother use this as an opportunity to move the fellow to the altar

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Pyle wants Sgt Carter to meet his cousin Bridey at the Camp Dance Carter declines until he and Cpl Boyle spot Pyle out with a very attractive girl They assume erroneously that the girl is Pyles cousin After that is explained there is another case of mistaken identity that keep Carter and Boyle busy

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways start disappearing one by one and when the remaining castaways discover that headhunters have not taken them Gilligan begins to think hes a Dr Jeckyll and Mr Hyde and has killed them all

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: An unattractive and lovelorn woman named Eva Grubb comes to the island to escape civilization and offers the castaways her boat But before they can leave the women give her a makeover and turn her into a Ginger Grant lookalike

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: In order to secure a loan from the bank Grampa must sign title to the McCoy farm over to his grandson Luke

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys dig up a brontosaurus leg bone on their property Kate wants to donate the bone to a museum but Grampa would rather cash in on a roadside stand tourist attraction

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max inherits the position of union negotiator between agents and CONTROL

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Both sides are kidnapping agents at such a rate that almost no one is left on either side

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: When the seven lady truckers are kidnapped to drug kingpin Leonard Markers San Pepe compound BJ Fred and Hatsie Tipton and a very unlikely ally team up to rescue them

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur Post and his wife Carol move into their first house They find the previous tenants horse abandoned in the backyard barn Carol insists on selling the animal but Wilbur wants to keep it To his surprise the horse agrees with him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The Posts neighbor Roger catches Mister Ed and Wilbur talking to each other

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: During an operation to send out twenty Allied soldiers two of them attempt an early escape and are nearly captured

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan talks Klink into building an officers club whereby a boat can be built to sail away with an escaped British POW and the German gunsight he snagged while escaping

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Crew take in a young orphan girl and go out of their way to make a happy home for her on their island But their extraordinary behavior arouses Binghamtons suspicions and he uses the situation to have the 73 Crew sized up as possible Section 8s by some visiting Psychiatrists

programme.desc: Filler

programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The famous Emerald Duck is stolen from the temple of the Sungod Inspector Gadget exposed the criminal and restores order

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The updated adventures of a bumbling detective

programme.title: The Presidents Plane Is Missing
programme.desc: An American President stumbles upon a secret world-threatening crisis

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Reverend Whitneys blind date faces scorn from parishioner Barbara Sharp Bert Wilder helps his wife Audrey deal with being blind Princess engineer Tonys vacation plans change so Julie and Gopher invite his family on a free cruise

programme.title: WKRP 213
programme.desc: WKRP 213

programme.title: Chopping Mall
programme.desc: A group of young shopping mall employees stay behind for a late night party in one of the stores When the mall goes on lock-down before they can get out the robot security system malfunctions and goes on a killing spree

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: When the Comfurt family suddenly strike it rich their car - containing their windfall in a safe locked inside the trunk - is stolen The Dukes track down the car as it changes into the hands of a ruthless bank robber

programme.title: Hercules 213
programme.desc: Hercules 213

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: An escaped Jiridian takes Lili hostage Their shuttle is sucked on to a Kimera ship where they with Liam have to go through an obstacle course to get to the core to exit

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens suffer from radiation poisoning and develop suits to protect themselves Meanwhile the government attempts to shut down Harrison and his team believing that the alien menace is no more

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Carla Jeffries uses Arcanes own scheming ways against him to take over his complex the doctor and Swamp Thing must work together to save both the swamp and Arcanes life

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Arcane hires mercenaries to kill Swamp Thing the injured creature uses Anne Fisks equipment to try to heal himself temporarily becoming human again Tressa discovers his secret and tries to help him

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: On the ice world of Ultima Thule the Alphans encounter members of lost earth expedition who have achieved immortality- but at a price!

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Victoria poses as a thief in order to become an inmate and investigate conditions at a womens prison Once in she finds it is a miserable place and that she may never be able to leave

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is driving a herd of horses across land he thought was open range The owner Martin Storm roughs him up and steals them He gets help from a local rancher who has been trying to rid the valley of this menace since he got there

programme.title: Young 316
programme.desc: Young 316

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A 15-year-old runaway girl comes to the apartment of the father she hasnt seen in years only to find a man dead inside When she finds out her father is not the dead man but possibly the killer she still continues to search for him not knowing that he is also being hunted by the brother of the dead man who plans to kill him

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: IMF team leader Dan Briggs assembles his team for the first time The mission to recover two nuclear warheads belonging to General Rio Dominguez from a hotel vault in Santa Costa Jim and Willy sneak safe-cracker Terry Targo into the vault who figures out how to get out The team then captures Dominguez but Targos fingers are broken in the attempt With no other alternative Briggs has himself and Dominguez put into the vault and Briggs threatens to enter a random combination if Alicio doesnt tell him the code Dominguez breaks With the bombs defused Willy takes the warheads out of the vault Briggs remains behind and uses the information Targo gathered earlier to get out during a fireworks distraction set off by Barney Briggs and the rest of the team make a desperate race for safety and get onto a plane heading to safety seconds before the military can catch up to them

programme.title: Dragnet 804
programme.desc: Dragnet 804

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A hated construction company owner with a heart condition recognizes Kimble and forces him to be his office assistant because of his doctor skills

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: While returning to Stockton Victoria and Jarrod stop in a town with outrageous prices for food lodging and services After finding out the people are bilking travelers to survive the Barkleys decide to open a shipping business to save the town-despite opposition from a territorial boss with a rival freight company in the area

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Tom Theocharis at HK50

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Jonas Correia v. Luis Diogo

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 43 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features the amateur matchup of debut Kyle Messenger vs. Patrick 'Cyborg' Leblanc. Also in his amateur debut, Nick Felber faces Tyler Kobayashi. The pro card begins with Trenton Rowell vs. former Light Heavyweight and Heavyweight Amateur Champion, Devon ""Mr. Boomtruck"" Smith. Capping this show is an exciting Light Heavyweight Title Fight between Misha Cirkunov defending his title against challenger Shaun Asher. You do not want to miss it!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Chapman v. Scott MacDonald

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The excitement never ends at Hard Knocks 43! Watch top Wrestler Justin Basra battle it out against Jason Fournier. Ryan Connor faces Owen Carr from Team Alpha Male in this exciting match displaying high level Jiu Jitsu skills.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Tiffany Cass v. Janice MacAulay

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Kes Mamba v. Wesley Johnson

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.desc: The Renegades hold a towns children hostage to force the adults to build a giant Ultra Zod which will conquer Earth and then GoBotron

programme.desc: When a giant robot designed to protect humanity from the Renegades turns against its creators the Renegades are quick to take advantage of the situation

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Audrics image is being projected from a body of water on a planet Jayce goes down to investigate even though Monster Minds are busy draining the water off Jayce meets the fish people the XHal and the Old One and they communicate by telepathy

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: On the ice planet Auriga revolutionary leader Cyrilla makes a deal with Saw Boss -- she delivers Jayce in return for Saw Boss deposing the gangster casino owner Marduk whos made slaves of everyone on the planet Cyrilla realizes her error

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Giant caterpillars appear in the Central American Jungle By clearing a path they reveal a map to the temple of an ancient Malacca civilization

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: The Statue of Liberty fails to reappear during Wondros magic act and ends up in a field in Iowa But VENOM has further plans to hold Lady Liberty for ransom

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger
